ENTERPRISE X-SERIES
High-Endurance 
PCIe Gen5 
Enterprise SSD for 
Write-Intensive 
Applications
PASCARI X200Z
• NVMe 2.0
• 128 Namespaces
• Power Loss Protection (PLP)
• ISE support
• AES-XTS 256-bit Encryption
• Data Integrity and Protection
• End-to-End Data Path 
Protection
• Metadata Protection
• SECDED
• Sanitize
• NVMe-MI (Management 
Interface)
• SMBus

Find more information and resources at: phisonenterprise.com
The data within this specification is subject to change by Phison without notice. Performance numbers may vary based 
on system configuration and testing conditions. Copyright © 2025 Phison Electronics. All rights reserved. 
(1) 1 TB = 1012 bytes.
(2) Sequential Performance is based on FIO on Linux, 512KB data size, with QD=32, 1 job.
(3) Random Performance is based on FIO on Linux, 4KB data size, QD=128, 8 jobs.
(4) Latency is measured with random workloads based on FIO on Linux, 4KB data size, QD=1, 1 job.
(5) Power consumption (average RMS) is measured during the sequential read/write and random read/write operations performed by iometer with the conditions described in (2) and (3).
(6) The results of DWPD are obtained in compliance with JESD219A standards.
